function_v0.doc: Number of whitelisted tokens. Paged enumeration: read this, then\nsupported_token_at(0..count) to recover the full whitelist from state\n(no dependence on ephemeral TokenRegistered/TokenDeregistered events).
function_v0.name: supported_token_count

function_v0.doc: Whitelisted token at `index`, or None when `index >= count`.
function_v0.name: supported_token_at
